query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_KEY FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='users' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user jbEC6vu1kEZPhSm.root --database cLUkBFbsZfcYG9rNRXMeP2 --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_KEY FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='users' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	COLUMN_TYPE	IS_NULLABLE	COLUMN_KEY
id	int	NO	PRI
openId	varchar(64)	YES	UNI
name	text	YES	
email	varchar(320)	YES	UNI
loginMethod	varchar(64)	YES	
role	enum('user','admin')	NO	
createdAt	timestamp	NO	
updatedAt	timestamp	NO	
lastSignedIn	timestamp	NO	
passwordHash	text	YES
